summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by integrating Nano Banana property images into HeroSection, FeaturesSection, and AboutSection. All six required image filenames are referenced in the component code and served from /assets/generated/. The components correctly use the images as backgrounds/cards matching the warm terracotta/earth-tone style. However, the actual image binary files are not shown as added in the diff (no files under frontend/public/assets/generated/ appear in the added files list), which raises a concern about whether the static assets themselves are present — though this may be a diff truncation artifact.

missing_requirements.requirement: Images are stored as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 0 added files and no binary/image files listed under frontend/public/assets/generated/. The component code references the images, but there is no evidence the actual PNG files (hero-nano-banana.dim_1920x1080.png, feature-accommodations.dim_800x600.png, feature-locations.dim_800x600.png, feature-service.dim_800x600.png, feature-personalized.dim_800x600.png, about-team.dim_900x700.png) were added to the repository.
